name: AI
description: Models may be affected by Special Rules that only affect AI Models.

name: AP (X)
description: Adds X to the Target's Armor Check number. For example, AP (2) converts an Armor 3+ to 5+.

name: Auto (X)
description: After shooting, the model may make up to X additional Shoot Actions. These additional shots cannot be Reacted to and must target models within 4" of the initial target.

name: Blast (X)
description: When this weapon hits, it also hits X additional models within 2" of the original target. Roll damage for each hit separately.

name: CQB
description: Reroll all failed shots against targets within half range of the weapon.

name: Cyclic
description: After a Shoot Action with this weapon, the model may make one additional Shoot or Ready Action.

name: Data Knife
description: Make a Data Attack Action (Skill Check). If successful, apply one Damage to an AI or Powered Model with no Armor Check allowed.

name: Deployed
description: If the model moved during its Reposition Step, it may only roll 1D10 when shooting this weapon during its Activation. Reactions are unaffected.

name: Drone
description: Cannot enter or participate in CQC. Cannot use ladders to move vertically or lean out.

name: EMP
description: Can only apply Damage to units with the AI special rule. No Armor Check is allowed.

name: Heavy
description: Gain +1 Shot during Reactions and Activations where the model didn't Move during the Reposition Step.

name: Indirect
description: May use another model within the Group's line of sight to determine the target, but weapon range is measured from the original (firing) model.

name: Jammer
description: Models within range ignore the effects of Pinned Markers on their Unit.

name: Jump (X)
description: This model may move up to X inches vertically during its Reposition Step, ignoring obstacles and terrain height.

name: Low Tech
description: Cannot gain Pinned Markers from Data Attacks or be Targeted by Indirect weapons.

name: Medium
description: Reroll one Failed Shot when used in a Shoot Action.

name: Melee
description: Never suffers -1D10 from Cover. When used in a Shooting Action, place the shooting model Base-to-Base with the target before resolving. Targets may only Return Fire with a Melee Weapon or Juke.

name: Powered
description: This model uses a powered combat suit with a separate damage track.

name: Seeking
description: Does not suffer -1 Shot from the target being in Cover.

name: Shield
description: This model and one friendly Infantry model in Base-to-Base contact gain Cover. Only one friendly model may benefit at a time.

name: Sustained (X)
description: The target must reroll X successful Armor D10 when making an Armor Check against this weapon.
